channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Breaking geopolitical news from Tier 1 sources worldwide

item.title: 🇵🇱 Poland Must Be Involved in Ukraine Peace Talks, Says PM Tusk
item.description: Polish Prime Minister Donald Tusk stated Poland should participate in discussions to end the war in Ukraine, following a London meeting of British, German, and French leaders with President Zelenskyy supporting ceasefire negotiations.

item.title: 🇧🇬 Bulgaria's New Government Ends Military Aid to Ukraine
item.description: Bulgaria's newly appointed defense minister announced the country will no longer provide arms to Ukraine and urged Moscow and Kyiv to negotiate, marking a significant shift in European support for Ukraine.

item.title: 🇬🇧 UK Faces 'Eye-Watering' Cuts to Fund Defense Pledges
item.description: Britain must make deep public sector cuts to fund defense spending commitments, according to the author of the UK's refreshed defense strategy, calling on Labour MPs to accept major trade-offs.

item.title: 🇪🇺 EU Approves 21st Sanctions Package Targeting Russian Economy
item.description: European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen announced the EU's 21st sanctions package, saying Russia's economy is "slowing sharply" as the bloc expands restrictions on Moscow's war machine.

item.title: 🇪🇪 Estonia's President Sees Summer Window to End Ukraine War
item.description: Estonian President Alar Karis said Europe should prepare now for possible peace talks and continue pressuring Russia through sustained sanctions and military support for Ukraine.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine and Latvia Sign Drone Technology Agreement
item.description: President Zelenskyy announced a drone deal with Latvia during the Nordic-Baltic summit in Estonia, as Ukraine offers to share its drone expertise with allies.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China and Georgia Elevate Ties to Strategic Partnership
item.description: Chinese President Xi Jinping and Georgian President Mikheil Kavelashvili exchanged messages upgrading bilateral relations to a comprehensive strategic partnership, deepening ties in the Caucasus region.

item.title: 🇱🇧 Israel Strikes Historic Port of Tyre in Lebanon, Killing Eight
item.description: Israeli forces struck the southern Lebanese city of Tyre, killing at least eight people in an escalation that adds strain to peace efforts in the broader Middle East conflict.

item.title: 🇺🇸💰 US Trade Deficit Narrows as Exports Hit Record High in April
item.description: The US trade deficit shrank in April as exports surged to unprecedented levels, bolstered by energy shipments and potentially contributing to quarterly economic growth.

item.title: 🇨🇳🤖 China Exports Surge Past Forecasts on Global AI Boom Demand
item.description: China's export growth accelerated in May, driven by strong demand for chips, electric vehicles, and high-tech goods fueling the global AI boom, providing relief amid energy price pressures.

item.title: 🇺🇸 US Lawmakers Push for Tighter Rules on Contract Chipmakers Supplying Chinese Firms
item.description: A bipartisan group of US lawmakers urged stricter regulations on semiconductor foundries that supply Chinese companies, targeting potential circumvention of export controls.

item.title: 🌍 UN's Guterres Calls for End to Violence in Middle East
item.description: UN Secretary-General Antonio Guterres expressed deep alarm over renewed violence in the Middle East and called on Israel to reopen crossings into Gaza amid escalating regional tensions.

item.title: 🇺🇦 NYT: Russia-Ukraine Drone War Shifts to NATO Territory
item.description: The New York Times reports on how drone warfare between Russia and Ukraine has expanded to involve NATO territory in Lithuania and Romania, raising alliance security concerns.

item.title: ⚔️ Russia Holds Naval Drills in Baltic Sea During Major NATO Exercises
item.description: Russia conducted naval exercises in the Baltic Sea simultaneously with major NATO military drills, highlighting continued strategic posturing in the contested region.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Satellite Images Suggest Israeli Air Base Hit in Iranian Missile Strikes
item.description: Satellite imagery analysis indicates damage at an Israeli air base following Iranian missile strikes, as regional tensions continue despite ceasefire discussions.

item.title: 🚁 AI Drone Company Helsing Deploys 'Flytrap' System for Ukraine
item.description: German AI defense company Helsing deployed its Flytrap drone system for Ukraine, marking continued Western military technology support in the conflict.

item.title: 💥 Car Explosion Kills One Near Moscow in Area for Military Personnel
item.description: A man was killed in a car explosion in a residential area outside Moscow designated for military personnel, according to Russian media reports.

item.title: 🇬🇧 UK Sanctions Networks Enabling Settler Violence in West Bank
item.description: Britain imposed sanctions on networks facilitating settler violence in the occupied West Bank, continuing pressure amid the broader Middle East conflict.

item.title: 🇫🇷 France Bans Israeli Finance Minister, Slams Gaza 'Recolonisation' Remarks
item.description: France announced it will bar Israel's finance minister from entry after he promoted what France called unacceptable statements about Gaza's "recolonisation."

item.title: 🇧🇬 Bulgaria Halts Ukraine Military Aid Under New Government
item.description: Bulgaria's new defense minister announced the country will stop providing military assistance to Ukraine and called for negotiations between Moscow and Kyiv.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China Delivers First Moon Far-Side Samples to Russian Scientists
item.description: China shared the first lunar far-side samples with Russian scientists, deepening scientific cooperation between Beijing and Moscow.

item.title: 🏛️ Israel-Iran Ceasefire: Regional Powers Push for Sustained Peace
item.description: Egypt, Saudi Arabia, Turkey, Pakistan and Qatar are leading diplomatic efforts to prevent renewed Israel-Iran fighting, as both sides agree to halt attacks for now.

item.title: 🌍 BBC: Israel and Iran Agree to Stop Attacks — For Now
item.description: Both Israel and Iran agreed to halt attacks, but warned they would retaliate if provoked, leaving the region in a tense standoff.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Russia Warns of Nuclear Weapons Use as War Setbacks Mount
item.description: Russia renewed its nuclear weapons threat as US officials warn Putin is suffering a strategic disaster in Ukraine, marking continued escalation rhetoric.

item.title: 💰 Dollar Eases as Israel-Iran Truce Holds, Inflation Data Looms
item.description: The dollar fell against major currencies as a fragile Israel-Iran ceasefire held, with investors eyeing upcoming US inflation data.
